system.description: Everything’s always playing. Say “red light!” to an object or person and roll [quality].

outcomes.success: the target is placed in a perfect state of suspended animation. While in this state, it is impervious to Harm, Chaos Effects, or aging. This effect is immediate: you may use it on an object that is actively breaking apart, burning, or exploding to prevent its destruction or preserve its contents. This effect lasts one week, or until you say “green light”.
outcomes.eachplus3:
choose one:
  • This ability affects an additional target.
  • This effect lasts an additional week.
  • The target’s transition into this state is gradual, and completes when they are not being observed.
  • You may temporarily suspend this effect and resume it once (for example, to have a brief conversation) without ending it.
  • The target is aware of its surroundings while under this effect.
outcomes.failure: the object, and everything currently touching it, spoils rapidly: rotting, crumbling to dust, desiccating, and dying.
